review_title: Simple, Intuitive, and Outstanding Support – A Great Time Tracking Solution!
description: My overall experience with TimeTrakGO has been excellent. The technology performs reliably, and the service and sales teams have been extremely helpful throughout the process. It's a great company that delivers on simplicity and support.
author: Vladimir B.
pros: The intuitive design, straightforward setup, and seamless kiosk functionality on tablets make TimeTrakGO incredibly user-friendly and efficient for daily operations.
cons: One suggestion for improvement would be to integrate an employee timesheet certification or approval mechanism, allowing employees to digitally sign off on timesheets for added compliance and accuracy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Better Than QuickBooks Time - and Half the Price!
description: I started using TimeTrakGo after getting frustrated with the cost of QuickBooks Time. The switch was simple, and their support team was phenomenal in guiding me through setup. I loved it so much that I moved both of my companies over. The system is easy to use, my team adapted quickly, and I really like the biometric and geofence features for accurate clock-ins. Best part? I’m now paying less than half of what I used to and getting the same core features. It’s been a smooth, positive experience from start to finish.
author: Lisa M.
pros: What I like most about TimeTrakGo is how much value I’m getting for the price—it’s less than half of what I paid for QuickBooks Time, but it still gives me all the features I need. The support team is phenomenal—super quick to respond, friendly, and they actually solve the problem on the first try. It’s also really easy to use, so my employees had no trouble learning it. I love the biometric facial recognition for secure clock-ins and the geofence feature that makes sure mobile clock-ins happen only at approved locations. It’s just a solid, reliable system that works.
cons: Honestly, there’s not much I dislike, but if I could change one thing, it would be to add email or mobile app alert notifications for certain situations, like missed punches or when someone is close to overtime. I’d also like to see a way to approve timecards directly in the system instead of just adding notes. It works fine as is, but those two features would make it even better and save a little extra time during payroll.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Don't do it, not worth it.
description: Poor. I am pissed they never informed me the last 2 years that it was renewing.
author: Andrew A.
pros: App worked well when I used it for 1 year.
cons: I used it one year, and was charged two more years on auto renewal without an email or info letting me know that they were doing so. Shitty integrity.

review_title: Overall a good software, could use some improvements though
description: So far it works well for my company since we do not have a large amount of employees and it's easy to review time and extract the hours for payroll.
author: Isaak K.
pros: The ease of setting up users (employees) is good. Correcting time and viewing reports is relatively easy as well.
cons: The integration for QuickBooks is not as useful as advertised. Importing a file into QuickBooks desktop has never been very easy or intuitive, and TimeTrakGo does not have a Web Connector integration so it really defeats the expectations when it is promised to have an "integration" for QBD.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am overall very pleased with TimeTrak Go and how easy it is to use. Adjusting time and logging someone's PTO hours is very easy.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: How easy it is to use. Keeping track of all the employees PTO hours is very helpful. All of our employees seem to have an easy time clocking in and out. I have had very little complaints since we have started using it.
cons: I wish we could differentiate between PTO and vacation hours. Sometimes the geotracking is also off, which makes it difficult to clock in and out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall the experience has made my job easier in being able to handle employees time for payroll and allowing them a simple log in and log out system to capture their time.
author: Christy S.
pros: Very user friendly for the employees to log in and out. All the administrator aspects are very easy to use for payroll.
cons: The only con I feel like is the employee can't see their previous days total time on their terminal.

description: Before using TimeTrakGo, we were using a software that was causing too much grief and headaches. Nothing was seeming to work correctly. When we switched to TimeTrakGo, we were up and running within two days. If we had/have any questions we were able to chat, and all of our questions were answered almost immediately.
author: Faith S.
pros: It is a simple/ easy to use time clock. The set up was extremely quick and easy. The app allows our technicians to clock in and out from the job site, rather than having to come back to the office.
cons: We do not use rounding for all of our departments. There is not a way to only have rounding for some departments, but not others. We decided to use the rounding for all departments. Everything seems to be working well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, I have been extremely satisfied. I highly recommend TimeTrakGO for keeping track of hourly employees clock times and PTO.
author: Karen F.
pros: The time keeping is easy to use and understand. The set-up was simple. The employees like it. It has made it easier to address missed punches quickly. The support is fantastic! Anytime that I have had a question, no matter how complex it seemed to me, a real person was there to help me. Their answers are clear and easy to understand.
cons: The only thing that I can think of is that I didn't know about it sooner. We had considered many products before we found TTG.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Fair enough, but there is a learning curve, so onboarding is necessary. Overall, though, it isn't a bad product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The cost, and once you are familar quth thr problem it is easy to use. The multiple ways to track time are useful.
cons: You pay for each user, even for the administrator who doesnt track time,so that is a hidden cost that really makes no sense since they don't track time. The admin should be included in the monthly fee. The payroll integration is also problematic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Chat with Real People to help!
author: Corinn M.
pros: Easy to set up. The chat feature is manned by real people who write back quickly with screenshots and specifics on how to do anything you might be stuck on.
cons: PTO and Sick time set up was a bit confusing. I needed alot of help to get it set to a normal place, luckily the chat team made it easy to find what I needed to change to make it work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Third Party Time Clock You'll Find
description: My TimeTrakGO was easier to setup and use than other more well known time clocks. My emps love the app and how easy it is to use. And, they know exactly how many hours they will paid for on the next check. On the admin side, it's very easy to review and correct punches. Just don't forget to hit the save button after adjustments. The reports are all inclusive and calculate OT.
author: Tracy N.
pros: This timeclock was incredibly easy to setup. We used it the same day I set it up.
cons: There are not many cons to this product. The one worth mention is the reports print several extra blank pages which is cumbersome and wasteful.

description: My overall experience has been very favorable. Anytime I've had an issue, TimeTrakGo employees have always listened and resolved any issue that I've had in the past. For many months now, I've had no issues and truly enjoy the use of TimeTrakGo for my payroll purposes.
author: Anglena W.
pros: What I like most about TimeTrakGo is its ease of use. I can easily add new hires or archive terminated employees in the system. I can easily adjust times when necessary. I can monitor where my employees' clock in at using the GPS application. Also, reports are easily created for printing or downloading which is great for payroll purposes. I highly recommend TimeTrakGo to any employer.
cons: I honestly have no dislikes about TimeTrakGo.

description: Very easy to use in the way we need. Provides us with all the information we need to complete a payroll.
author: Sheila P.
pros: The system is very user friendly. Reports provide needed information. Support is good
cons: There is really nothing I like least that I have found to date

description: Overall, TimeTrakGo is well-designed and has great potential. However, the system should be smart enough to ignore accidental double-taps or merge them so that the following work hours are calculated properly. If this calculation bug is fixed, it would be a much more reliable tool for daily use.
author: Hyein C.
pros: TimeTrakGo interface is very clean and professional. It allows me to check my shift status and work hours at a glance, which is very convenient. I also appreciate the direct customer service feature that allows users to report issues immediately.
cons: If I accidentally "Clock In" twice—for example, when returning from a break—the system fails to calculate the subsequent work hours correctly. Although the data is saved, the time between that double-entry and the final "Clock Out" is not recognized as valid work hours. This leads to inaccurate payroll records and requires manual corrections every time a simple double-tap occurs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Experience has been very positive. Upgrading from our previous version was a no-brainer. Very user friendly. Speed is great.
author: Kim W.
pros: I like not having physical time clocks and our employees can clock in and out on their phones from job site. No more I lost or forgot my key fob.
cons: Don't like that when their is an update to the phone app it doesn't tell you. The screen just goes white and employees panic. I wish the scheduling was more customizable by location and employee.

review_title: Customer Service & Ease of Use for Platform
description: My overall experience is excellent - If we can't find answers in the Help section, you reach out to them and they will help you through whatever questions you have. When it was initially set up they made it so easy.
author: Charlene H.
pros: This platform is very simple to use. Easy to add employees for the use of the timecards. We use it for multiple Companies we track and they make it so simple to pull reports for each entity. The employees seem to think it is so simple to clock in and out.
cons: We really haven't found anything that we really don't like about the platform. They have streamlined and made i simple to use/setup.

description: It's been great. Was an easy solution for my employees to track time and to track PTO, etc. Very user friendly.
author: Tiera S.
pros: Easy to use and set up my employees. Priced well. Robust system. I like the geofencing option. My employees love it.
cons: They interface seems a little dated, but the technology doesn't. But overall, I'm really happy with it.

description: We are a small company. Before we implemented this service, I was in charge of keeping up with time sheets. leave request, etc. all done in paper. This has freed up a lot of my time, and made it way more simple to track employee time and request off.
author: Theresa H.
pros: The ease of real time use. Employees no longer have to turn in paper copies to be corrected, and corrected again.
cons: I would like to see it be able to line up to Fiscal year time lines. We were able to adjust the time line to make it work, but would be much easier if it was an option to pick.

description: Overall, positive experience with TimeTrakGO. Extremely helpful and timely client support services. The program offered security features and ease of use.
author: Prashanta P.
pros: Set up TimeTrakGO for a client for time and PTO tracking. Liked that the product was efficient and easy to navigate. Employees liked the convenience of the mobile App.
cons: None that comes to mind as there were no concerns or major issues. The implementation was smooth as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Solved lots of employee giving us wrong hours on the clock.
description: Was set up in 15 minutes, started adding employee right away was up and running within 30 minutes and solved lots of problems.
author: Ethan B.
pros: Very easy to navigate and set up. Also giving multiple options to employee how to enter their hours.
cons: Looking forward to be able to set up employee with a paid break VS having to add an extra 30 minutes a day.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Solid bang for the buck, simple and easy to use. Holiday pay and vacation time tracking are a great feature as well.
author: Scott M.
pros: Simple web accessible tool. Works great for our needs in our environment people are not allowed to use smart phones so this was a perfect solution for us.
cons: I would like an additional calendar that doesn't track hours just shows where people are or what event they are attending. Because their hours are already tracked by a punch in.

description: Great online time clock service that handled our needs and our budget.
author: Sylvia B.
pros: How simple and easy to use. Also good cost.
cons: Looked like an older system. Could have been laid out in a nicer format.

review_title: Intuitive and Efficient, but with Room for Improvement
description: Overall, TimeTrakGO offers excellent value, especially for small to mid-sized businesses looking for a user-friendly time tracking solution. With a few tweaks, it could easily be a five-star product.
author: Jazmine H.
pros: TimeTrakGO has been a game-changer for our time tracking needs. The simplicity of its graphical timecards makes it easy for our team to log hours accurately, and the mobile access with GPS tracking ensures that even our remote employees can clock in without hassle. The PTO tracking feature has also streamlined our process for managing vacation and sick leave, which used to be a headache with spreadsheets.
cons: The biggest downside is the lack of integration with our payroll system, which forces us to manually enter hours. This adds unnecessary time to our payroll process and increases the risk of errors. Another frustration is the app’s heavy reliance on internet connectivity. If the signal is weak or goes down, tracking hours becomes impossible, causing disruptions to our workflow.

description: I think this is great for the price and the service received.
author: Kindra I.
pros: Ease of use. Staff and customer service is prompt to respond to issues.
cons: The only way to save your changes is to leave the page and you are prompted to save. They should have an option to save so you don't have to leave the page.

description: The main issue is the tablet disconnects due to "updates" and then it becomes useless for my employees at our client site in the mornings or at night.
author: Ryan P.
pros: Ease to login normally. The main issue is the tablet disconnects due to "updates" and then it becomes useless for my employees at our client site in the mornings or at night.
cons: The main issue is the tablet disconnects due to "updates" and then it becomes useless for my employees at our client site in the mornings or at night.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
